calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dean Lloyd for and with Cassandra Waller-Mims. Kathryn Galves (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Lloyd stated that payment of between $15,000.00 to $18,000.00 to Charles Waller came out of the sales proceeds, that Mr. Waller was the only one of the children that took it upon himself to pay the taxes, insurance and do repairs to sell the property, that Mr. Waller advanced funds and that Mr. Waller was paid by way of an agreement of the other three Beneficiaries. Mr. Lloyd also stated that removal of the Franchise Tax Board issue will ultimately reduce the reserve, that the reserve amount was an estimate by the CPA for the capital gains tax issue, that the reserve is still needed, addressed the request for extraordinary fees and explained services provided, circumstances and the condition of the property. Ms. Waller-Mims stated that she wants to be paid for her out of pocket expenses. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims (Administrator).

Mr. Bournique stated that escrow has not closed, that he was told that escrow should close by Monday, that there is a dispute regarding funds coming out of escrow and that he expects it to be done within two weeks. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to April 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Continued To Dec-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephanie Perez for Cassandra Waller-Mims (Administrator).

Ms. Perez stated that there were problems with the Lender, that the Lender had an additional appraisal done last week, that they expect the results this week, that the Buyer and the Seller beleive that all of the issues will be resolved with the Lender, and that the sale will be completed within two weeks. In addition, Ms. Perez stated that the Buyer is on the property but not living in the property, that the Buyer made some repairs to make the propertry more attractive to the Lender, that there were some squatters in the property and that the Buyer is aware that all of the repairs he has made at his expense. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to December 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims.

Mr. Bournique requested a continuance stating that escrow was not completed because their is an issue with the Lender and the Title Company with regard to zoning. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to November 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Ruiz.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1635 Jerrold Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims.

The Court raised the issue as to whether it can or should award a commission to the Administrator, referred to Probate Code 10616 (b) and stated that it can't award said commission. Counsel stated that he wanted to go forward with the sale and was given the opportunity to communicate with all Parties outside of the courtroom regarding how the commissions are to be paid. Upon returning, Counsel indicated that they agreed to 2.5% commissions going to the Buyer's Agent and the other 2.5% to the Estate. The Estate owns 25% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $330,000.00 for 100% of the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 15, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account in lieu of bond. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for October 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1635 Jerrold Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims (Administrator).

The Buyer Mr. Koltuniak and his Agent were present in Court and waive notice of the petition. The Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property was continued to September 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further publication. Mr. Bournique was informed that notice should be given to the Trustee not the Trust. Time for notice by publication was shortened to 5-days. Counsel also addressed the issue of commision to the Personal Representative.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1635 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was taken off calendar at the request of Counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1635 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-07-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique on behalf of Attorney Dean Lloyd for Cassandra Waller-Sims.

The Court stated that the amount of the bid was not within 90% of the re-appraisal and that the sale could not go forward. The Petition for Confirmation of Sale was continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a re-appraisal or submission of declarations to support the sale.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1635 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Continued To Jun-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: August Bournique for Cassandra Waller-Mims. Mohammed Mah (Buyer) also present.

Mr. Mah stated that he waives notice of the sale. The Court stated that the return bid was not 90% of the re-appraised value. Mr. Bournique explained the condition of the property and stated that there are no other interested Buyers. The matter was continued to June 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a re-appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
